title: Book Club, Workshops, & Community Events

blocks.hero_alt: Open book and tea representing community learning
blocks.hero_subtitle: Find connection, support, and growth through community.

blocks.body:
This isn't your neighborhood book club (and, hey, we love a neighborhood book club!). While it definitely has a social component, our virtual book club focuses on self-reflection and building and sharing insight. We dive into texts that explore the human experience, from nervous system regulation to the art of belonging, facilitated through a therapeutic lens.

A Note on the Space:
While this book club is facilitated by a [therapist](/about) and may be therapeutic, *it's not therapy*. Because this is an educational and growth-oriented space rather than a clinical one, you don't need to be an active therapy client, and you don't need to be a resident of Virginia to join us. Everyone is welcome at the table.

* The Model: We’re returning to a monthly drop-in format. No long-term commitments; just a seat at the digital table when a specific book or topic resonates with you and your journey.
* Next Gathering: Currently curating for Spring 2025.
* The Vibe: Low pressure, high insight, grounded in community.

*Be the first to receive our monthly title selections and registration links by joining the waitlist!*
blocks.subtitle: Monthly | Virtual | Deeply Reflective
blocks.title: Therapeutic Book Club

items.title: Breathing Room
items.subtitle: In-person at Rust Library | FREE
items.text:
Feeling overwhelmed? Could you just use a break, a moment to breathe? Join us for Breathing Room, a free community wellness event designed to help you find calm and clarity through simple, bite-sized mindfulness exercises.

_This event is open to the public. No pressure to participate beyond your comfort level. Whether you’re new to mindfulness or looking to deepen your practice, you’re welcome._

items.title: Quarterly Networking Lunch
items.text:
Looking to connect with fellow therapists and mental health professionals in Loudoun County? Join us for a relaxed, community-focused quarterly networking lunch. This gathering is a welcoming space for Loudoun-based clinicians to meet, share resources, and build relationships. Whether you're a seasoned practitioner, recently licensed, or just starting in private practice, you're welcome here. No pressure to present or perform—just come as you are.
Get on the invite list

subtitle: Find connection, support, and growth through community.
